final_prompt.prompt:
Create a food-photography close-up of Japanese ramen (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a food-photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a close-up shot with shallow depth of field (background bokeh), chopsticks lifting noodles as focal point
Subject: must include tonkotsu broth, chashu, soft-boiled egg, nori, scallions, chopsticks lifting noodles
Scene/backdrop: must be a blurred background context
Lighting/mood: needs an appetizing, steamy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, appetizing direction — exact saturation and warmth are yours
Materials/textures: must include steam rising from the hot broth
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
